        BulletHitArmourSound = ArmourFirearmHitKevlar,
        WeaponHitArmourSound = ArmourMeleeHitKevlar,
        DiscomfortModifier = 0.1,
        Tags = base:ignorezombiedensity;base:pickaramidthread,
        ClothingExtraSubmenu = LeftShin,
        ClothingItemExtra = Base.GreaveBodyArmour_Right_Police,
        ClothingItemExtraOption = RightShin,
        Researchablerecipes = MakeShinBulletproofVestArmor;MakeThighBulletproofVestArmor;MakeForearmBulletproofVestArmor,
    }

        BulletHitArmourSound = ArmourFirearmHitKevlar,
        WeaponHitArmourSound = ArmourMeleeHitKevlar,
        DiscomfortModifier = 0.1,
        Tags = base:ignorezombiedensity;base:pickaramidthread,
        ClothingExtraSubmenu = LeftThigh,
        ClothingItemExtra = Base.ThighBodyArmour_R,
        ClothingItemExtraOption = RightThigh,
        Researchablerecipes = MakeShinBulletproofVestArmor;MakeThighBulletproofVestArmor;MakeForearmBulletproofVestArmor,
    }

        DiscomfortModifier = 0.1,
        Tags = base:ignorezombiedensity;base:pickaramidthread,
        ClothingExtraSubmenu = RightForearm,
        ClothingItemExtra = Base.Vambrace_BodyArmour_Left_Civ,
        ClothingItemExtraOption = LeftForearm,
        Researchablerecipes = MakeShinBulletproofVestArmor;MakeThighBulletproofVestArmor;MakeForearmBulletproofVestArmor,
    }
